raw_transcript: Sometimes gluten can hide in unexpected places—lipsticks, medications, or even some 'gluten-free' oats that are cross-contaminated. Have you noticed any itchy skin rashes?
final_corrected_note: Sometimes gluten can hide in unexpected places—lipsticks, medications, or even some 'gluten-free' oats that are cross-contaminated. Have you noticed any itchy skin rashes?
